attributes.title: [HAProxy OTel] Server
attributes.description: Per-server health, latency, error rates, failed health checks, downtime, sessions, and throughput. Compare across servers within a backend.

params.markdown:
## [HAProxy OTel] Server

Per-server metrics for backend pool members:
- Health (active/backup, weight)
- Latency and error rates
- Failed health checks and downtime
- Sessions and throughput comparison

query.esql:
TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name != "FRONTEND" AND haproxy.service_name != "BACKEND" AND haproxy.active IS NOT NULL
| STATS active = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(haproxy.active))

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name != "FRONTEND" AND haproxy.service_name != "BACKEND" AND haproxy.active IS NOT NULL
| STATS active = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(haproxy.active))

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name != "FRONTEND" AND haproxy.service_name != "BACKEND" AND haproxy.failed_checks IS NOT NULL
| STATS failed = SUM(RATE(haproxy.failed_checks))

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name != "FRONTEND" AND haproxy.service_name != "BACKEND" AND haproxy.failed_checks IS NOT NULL
| STATS failed = SUM(RATE(haproxy.failed_checks))

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name != "FRONTEND" AND haproxy.service_name != "BACKEND" AND haproxy.responses.errors IS NOT NULL
| STATS err_rate = SUM(RATE(haproxy.responses.errors))

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name != "FRONTEND" AND haproxy.service_name != "BACKEND" AND haproxy.responses.errors IS NOT NULL
| STATS err_rate = SUM(RATE(haproxy.responses.errors))

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name != "FRONTEND" AND haproxy.service_name != "BACKEND" AND haproxy.clients.canceled IS NOT NULL
| STATS canceled = SUM(RATE(haproxy.clients.canceled))

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name != "FRONTEND" AND haproxy.service_name != "BACKEND" AND haproxy.clients.canceled IS NOT NULL
| STATS canceled = SUM(RATE(haproxy.clients.canceled))

attributes.title: Response Time by Server Over Time

query.esql:
TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name != "FRONTEND" AND haproxy.service_name != "BACKEND" AND haproxy.responses.average_time IS NOT NULL
| STATS resp_time = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(haproxy.responses.average_time)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), haproxy.proxy_name, haproxy.service_name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name != "FRONTEND" AND haproxy.service_name != "BACKEND" AND haproxy.responses.average_time IS NOT NULL
| STATS resp_time = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(haproxy.responses.average_time)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), haproxy.proxy_name, haproxy.service_name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name != "FRONTEND" AND haproxy.service_name != "BACKEND" AND haproxy.server_selected.total IS NOT NULL
| STATS selections = SUM(RATE(haproxy.server_selected.total)) BY haproxy.proxy_name, haproxy.service_name
| SORT selections DESC
| LIMIT 15

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name != "FRONTEND" AND haproxy.service_name != "BACKEND" AND haproxy.server_selected.total IS NOT NULL
| STATS selections = SUM(RATE(haproxy.server_selected.total)) BY haproxy.proxy_name, haproxy.service_name
| SORT selections DESC
| LIMIT 15

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name != "FRONTEND" AND haproxy.service_name != "BACKEND"
| STATS conn_err = SUM(RATE(haproxy.connections.errors)), resp_err = SUM(RATE(haproxy.responses.errors)), retries = SUM(RATE(haproxy.connections.retries)) BY haproxy.proxy_name, haproxy.service_name
| EVAL conn_err = COALESCE(conn_err, 0)
| EVAL resp_err = COALESCE(resp_err, 0)
| EVAL retries = COALESCE(retries, 0)
| EVAL total_err = conn_err + resp_err + retries
| SORT total_err DESC
| LIMIT 15

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name != "FRONTEND" AND haproxy.service_name != "BACKEND"
| STATS conn_err = SUM(RATE(haproxy.connections.errors)), resp_err = SUM(RATE(haproxy.responses.errors)), retries = SUM(RATE(haproxy.connections.retries)) BY haproxy.proxy_name, haproxy.service_name
| EVAL conn_err = COALESCE(conn_err, 0)
| EVAL resp_err = COALESCE(resp_err, 0)
| EVAL retries = COALESCE(retries, 0)
| EVAL total_err = conn_err + resp_err + retries
| SORT total_err DESC
| LIMIT 15

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name != "FRONTEND" AND haproxy.service_name != "BACKEND" AND haproxy.sessions.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS sessions = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(haproxy.sessions.count)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), haproxy.proxy_name, haproxy.service_name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name != "FRONTEND" AND haproxy.service_name != "BACKEND" AND haproxy.sessions.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS sessions = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(haproxy.sessions.count)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), haproxy.proxy_name, haproxy.service_name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name != "FRONTEND" AND haproxy.service_name != "BACKEND"
| STATS active = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(haproxy.active)), weight = AVG(LAST_OVER_TIME(haproxy.weight)), resp_time = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(haproxy.responses.average_time)), conn_err = SUM(RATE(haproxy.connections.errors)), resp_err = SUM(RATE(haproxy.responses.errors)), failed_checks = SUM(RATE(haproxy.failed_checks)), selections = SUM(RATE(haproxy.server_selected.total)), sessions = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(haproxy.sessions.count)) BY haproxy.proxy_name, haproxy.service_name, haproxy.addr
| SORT selections DESC
| LIMIT 100

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name != "FRONTEND" AND haproxy.service_name != "BACKEND"
| STATS active = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(haproxy.active)), weight = AVG(LAST_OVER_TIME(haproxy.weight)), resp_time = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(haproxy.responses.average_time)), conn_err = SUM(RATE(haproxy.connections.errors)), resp_err = SUM(RATE(haproxy.responses.errors)), failed_checks = SUM(RATE(haproxy.failed_checks)), selections = SUM(RATE(haproxy.server_selected.total)), sessions = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(haproxy.sessions.count)) BY haproxy.proxy_name, haproxy.service_name, haproxy.addr
| SORT selections DESC
| LIMIT 100
